column7: Typo – Check this for a Global Correction, in case it happens again!
Typo – In Sanskrit compounding, joining kūṭa (neuter noun ending in short 'a') and the headword kuṭṭāka results simply in kūṭakuṭṭāka.
Typo – This also may be a safe Global Correction, since the long vowel " ī " will be mostly likely used for the feminine adjectives.
